featuresNotYetImplemented.name: User Authentication
featuresNotYetImplemented.description: User signs up and logs in to access the application.

featuresNotYetImplemented.name: Manual Meal Logging
featuresNotYetImplemented.description: Manual food entry with portion size selection and recent/frequent foods for quick entry.

featuresNotYetImplemented.name: AI Photo Logging
featuresNotYetImplemented.description: Capture or upload food images with automatic food identification and calorie estimation.

featuresNotYetImplemented.name: Daily Dashboard
featuresNotYetImplemented.description: Daily calorie and macro summary with updated nutrition information.

featuresNotYetImplemented.name: Goal Setting
featuresNotYetImplemented.description: Sets basic goals including weight and target calories.

featuresNotYetImplemented.name: Progress Tracking
featuresNotYetImplemented.description: Progress charts showing weight, calories, and macros over time.

featuresNotYetImplemented.name: User Profile Management
featuresNotYetImplemented.description: Profile management for goals and personal data.

featuresNotYetImplemented.name: Nutrition Insights
featuresNotYetImplemented.description: Daily and weekly nutrition insights with suggestions for improvement.

columnsSpecifiedInSpec.name: weight
columnsSpecifiedInSpec.notes: User's current weight for goal tracking

apiEndpointsToBuild.description: Log a new meal with food items and nutrition data
Upload food image and get AI-powered food identification and nutrition estimation
Get daily nutrition summary including calories and macros
Set user's nutrition and weight goals
Get progress charts data for weight, calories, and macros
Get personalized nutrition insights and suggestions
Get user's recent and frequent foods for quick entry

openQuestions: What specific goal types should be supported beyond weight and target calories?
How should the food database be populated - third-party API integration or manual curation?
What micronutrients should be tracked in the future implementation?
How should portion sizes be standardized and measured?
What timeframes should progress charts cover (weekly, monthly, yearly)?
How frequently should nutrition insights be generated and updated?
What constitutes 'recent' and 'frequent' foods for quick entry suggestions?
